name: spotify-top-tracks
description: Get the user's most-played Spotify tracks. Returns track names, artists, albums, and popularity. Use for questions like 'what songs have I been listening to?', 'what are my top tracks this month?', 'what music am I into lately?', 'show my most played songs'. time_range: short_term=4 weeks, medium_term=6 months, long_term=all time.

input.description: Query parameters: time_range (short_term|medium_term|long_term, default medium_term), limit (1-50, default 20).

output.description: Spotify top tracks response with items array. Each track has name, artists (array), album name, duration_ms, popularity (0-100), and Spotify ID.
